title: rust-coreos-installer bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.24.0-3]
- Use the full path for the 'root=' kernel arg when rootfs on mpath
  Backport https://github.com/coreos/coreos-installer/pull/1677

[0.24.0-2]
- Restore single-decimal precision to stream output
  Backport https://github.com/coreos/coreos-installer/pull/1654

[0.24.0-1]
- Update to latest upstream
full_text:
[0.24.0-3]
- Use the full path for the 'root=' kernel arg when rootfs on mpath
  Backport https://github.com/coreos/coreos-installer/pull/1677

[0.24.0-2]
- Restore single-decimal precision to stream output
  Backport https://github.com/coreos/coreos-installer/pull/1654

[0.24.0-1]
- Update to latest upstream

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-15882.html
